conflicts.label: Iran 2026 (Day 67)
conflicts.note: Operation Epic Fury — Day 67. Ceasefire Day 27 (indefinite extension Day 14); Trump's 'hostilities terminated' WPR letter to Hill (May 1) remains contested. Pentagon May 5 briefing (Hegseth/Caine) confirms 'ceasefire is not over'; Project Freedom 'defensive in nature, focused in scope and temporary in duration... separate and distinct from Operation Epic Fury' (Hegseth); Caine: Iran has attacked US forces 10+ times, commercial vessels 9 times, seized 2 container ships since ceasefire — 'all below the threshold of restarting major combat operations.' CSG count CENTCOM 3→2 (Lincoln + Bush co-located Northern Arabian Sea — first time two CSGs together since conflict began per USNI Fleet Tracker May 4); Ford CSG transited Suez NORTHBOUND May 1 returning Norfolk after 314-day record-setting deployment; Tripoli LHA-7 ARG remains Arabian Sea; Boxer ARG inbound (entered Indian Ocean May 1 via Malacca). 22,500 mariners on 1,550+ vessels stuck in Persian Gulf (Caine). Project Freedom Day 1 (May 4): US Navy sank 6 IRGC small boats while facilitating passage of 2 US-flagged merchant vessels; CENTCOM denied Iranian Fars News claim of US warship struck near Jask. Iran retaliated by striking UAE for first time since 8 Apr ceasefire — Fujairah Oil Industry Zone (VTTI/Habshan-Fujairah pipeline endpoint) in flames; ADNOC tanker 'Barakah' hit by 2 drones; UAE intercepted 12 BM + 3 CM + 4 UAVs. UAE airspace partial closure (NOTAM A1722/26) in effect May 4-11. Brent intraday $112.90 (-1.4% vs May 4 settle $114.44); WTI $104.20 (-2.0% vs $106.42); AAA gas $4.483/gal (+2.6¢ d/d, +49.9% vs $2.99 baseline). Iran 14-pt counter-proposal in stalemate; FM Baghaei: '14-point plan exclusively focuses on ending the war and contains no issues related to the nuclear domain'; IRGC: Trump 'must choose between an impossible military operation or a bad deal.' Lebanon front structurally widening: IDF >20 Hezbollah-linked sites Beqaa + south May 4; cumulative MoPH 2,696/8,264 (May 4 floor; no consolidated May 5 update). U.S. KIA 15 (all-cause; Pentagon-official 13 combat-only); WIA 415 (carry-forward). Cumulative U.S. cost midpoint $55.64B; range $25B (Pentagon Comptroller Hurst Apr 29 official) → $40-50B (CBS sourcing internal officials) → ~$1T (CSIS upper bound incl. economic spillover). Day 67 places this conflict between Operation Desert Storm (43 days, passed Day 44) and Operation Allied Force / Kosovo (78 days, 11 days short).

conflicts.label: Iraq 2003 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Iraqi Freedom — "shock and awe" + ground invasion. 300,000 troops deployed.

conflicts.label: Libya 2011 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Odyssey Dawn / Unified Protector — NATO no-fly zone. Limited US role.

conflicts.label: Gulf 1991 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Desert Storm — 38-day air campaign + 100-hour ground war. 700,000 coalition troops.

sources: CRS Reports R44116 (Iraq), RL33110 (Gulf War), R41725 (Libya). Costs inflation-adjusted to 2026 dollars using BLS CPI-U.
